{{Quote|The guy we met hit the guy who lived there just as he was going in. They fought for few seconds, and then there was a lot of quiet, and then the guy we talked to came staggering out of there with the other guy across his shoulders. Dead, I think. And me without anyone to bet with.|Wes Janson on Garatty ke Kith's death|<ref name="sof" />}}
'''Garatty ke Kith''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] from the nation of [[Cartann]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. He had a feud with fellow Adumari [[Irasal ke Voltin]], who ambushed him as he was going in to his apartment. ke Kith lost the duel and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]], who witnessed the fight, believed him to be [[Death/Legends|dead]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
